title: Monday expert wanted
excerpt: We are looking for an expert to review our current setup as we have been using Monday for nearly a year and have set it up ourselves with no previous experience in order to make suggestions/help us make improvements to g…

posts.author: SarahJacobs (Sarah Jacobs)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking for an expert to review our current setup as we have been using Monday for nearly a year and have set it up ourselves with no previous experience in order to make suggestions/help us make improvements to get the best out of Monday. We use Monday for our CRM, inventory, production, installation scheduling, admin tasks and document storage and don’t have any integrations as yet, nor have we linked Monday to our email. We’re a small team based in Sydney so would want to meet online during our office hours. Thanks

posts.author: Bianca (Bianca Clement)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SarahJacobs I am a monday Expert located in Sydney as well. I’ve been working with monday for four years now, specialising in helping small businesses. I’d love to help you out with this.

Feel free to shoot me an email at biancajclement@gmail.com and we can discuss further.

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SarahJacobs,
We here at upstream are a monday.com platinum partner located in Canberra. We have many years experience in consulting monday.com workflows and assisting organisations adapt monday.com to your requirements.
Please book a complimentary session with me below to discuss further:
Book Session here

Regards,
Alex Robinson
upstream

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SarahJacobs

Good on you for building a nice foundation with monday.com. CarbonWeb has been partnering with companies to align their components within their organization and I would be delighted to see how our team may be able to help. We specialize in small to medium sized businesses and I would be happy to provide you with a free one-hour consultation.

If you want to schedule for this week please select a time here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you continue using monday.com!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC

posts.author: SarahJacobs (Sarah Jacobs)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for your offer Ricky, but I have reached out to others within my timezone first, but I will contact you if I still need your help.

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml: Look forward to our session Sarah. See you then
